brief_title: Validation of KELIM as a Predictive/Prognostic Factor for Maintenance Treatment With iPARP in First-Line Ovarian Cancer
official_title: PAOLA-1 Ancillary Study: Retrospective Validation of KELIM as a Predictive and Prognostic Factor for Maintenance Treatment With PARP Inhibitor After Platinum-Based Chemotherapy in First-Line Ovarian Cancer
